requirements.title: Configuration Schema
requirements.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for configuration layers and merged config

requirements.title: Sensitive Fields
requirements.description: Define list of sensitive fields that cannot be overridden

requirements.title: File Loading
requirements.description: Load configuration from user and project directories

requirements.title: Sensitive Field Protection
requirements.description: Reject project-level overrides of sensitive fields

requirements.title: Four-layer Merge
requirements.description: Implement merge logic for builtin, user, project, and runtime layers

requirements.title: Deterministic Merge
requirements.description: Ensure same inputs always produce same outputs

requirements.title: Hot-reload Activation Boundary
requirements.description: Apply new config only to workflows starting after reload time
